thesis_profile.market_mechanism: Phase 1b factor family expansion built on xs_minimal_v4 (v89). Retains the 4 v89 multi-timescale families (low-vol anomaly, intraday vol smoothing, distance-to-high reversion, top-trader contrarian positioning) and adds 5 new factor families covering crowding, stress, and order-flow disagreement: momentum_decay (mean reversion at 1-week scale), quality_proxy (funding * OI growth = long-crowding), liquidity_stress (volume * intraday vol = stress persistence), order_flow_dispersion (taker imbalance dispersion = intraday disagreement), funding_crowding (funding z-score * basis tension). All 5 new families hypothesized negative sign and weighted at 0.10 each (secondary to v89 core which keeps original v83 weight magnitudes).
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-20 liquid perp-covered names by 4 multi-timescale family means (v89 core, weights -0.30/-0.25/+0.25/-0.20) plus 5 new family z-scores (Phase 1b additions, all weight -0.10). Expected: rank IC >= 0.22 (above v89 0.199), regime worst >= -1.6 (above v89 -1.98), continued cross-regime stability improvement.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: family_X = mean(z(X_5d), z(X_20d), z(X_60d)) for X in {rv, iv, dh, tt}; raw = -0.30*family_rv -0.25*family_iv +0.25*family_dh -0.20*family_tt -0.10*z(momentum_decay) -0.10*z(quality_funding_oi) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.10*z(coinglass_taker_imb_intraday_dispersion_24h) -0.10*z(funding_crowding_basis); final = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80)
